training_data_statement: Model trained only on public Poker44 benchmark releaseVersion v1.13 through sourceDate 2026-07-09; it uses live-sized within-batch behavioural features augmented with deterministic v11 telemetry features and serves a rank-ladder over the rank_mean head selected by live-sized stress robustness; unlabeled forward-audit payloads were used only for shape checks; no validator-private labels, wallets, hotkeys, IPs, or private player data.
